title: [CODEREVIEW-PASS2] CCP-17 Zephyr capacity validation - security
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c and coap_dtn.c: CBOR ctx overflow flag is set but some paths ignore return value of encode functions leading to partial CBOR or stack buffer issues. No bounds on snprintf in format_ipv6. Must add strict validation and error propagation for capacity. No comments. Follow Zephyr Kconfig for MAX sizes.
